marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Move-In Ready at Heights at Penderbrook! Welcome to 12101 Green Leaf Ct #102, a beautifully renovated 3-bedroom, 2-bath condo in the heart of Fairfax. This inviting ground-level home has been thoughtfully updated and is truly turn-key. Enjoy a brand-new kitchen featuring new appliances, complemented by fresh paint throughout and new plush carpeting that gives the entire home a clean, modern feel. The main living area is new LVP. The spacious layout offers comfortable living and dining areas, three well-proportioned bedrooms, and two full baths—perfect for everyday living, guests, or a home office setup. An assigned parking space adds convenience, while the desirable Heights at Penderbrook community places you close to shopping, dining, parks, and major commuter routes. Stylish, refreshed, and ready for its next owner—this is Fairfax living at its best. Schedule your tour today and move right in!

Welcome to 4434 Fair Lakes Court. This beautiful two year young town home offers superb features and upgrades, including: gourmet upgraded kitchen highlighted by a palatial center island w/ extra wide sink, built-in microwave, upgraded cabinets, including a cabinetry encased range hood over a 5 burner gas cooktop, granite counter tops, double wall ovens with wi-fi; kitchen opens to spacious family room featuring an Allusion Platinum 70 inch electric fireplace; main level office nook; bright, spacious bedroom, including a sumptuous owner’s suite w/ expansive bathroom and deep walk-in closet; the lower level highlights include a beautiful front office, convenient powder room and two car garage. Other notables: upgraded hardwood flooring, including oak stair treads w/ white risers  &  craftsman railings. Features included that are no longer offered by the builder: mid-kitchen layout, home office and the second level office nook. Quick closing possible, another convenience not available from the builder. All of this is in the heart of Fair Lakes – popular for its numerous outstanding amenities - from upscale Whole Foods to Walmart, Target, Best Buy, plus numerous restaurants, plus quick and easy access to Costco, Fairfax Corner, and so much more. Plus, just a hop, skip and a jump to get to the Fairfax County Parkway and I66. Don’t miss this one!

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this completely remodeled main-level living home, perfectly situated on a coveted corner lot with beautiful curb appeal. Step inside to find an open and inviting layout featuring three spacious bedrooms and two and a half bathrooms on the main floor. The primary suite is a true retreat with a spa-inspired bathroom, boasting a huge standing shower, soaking tub, and elegant finishes. Convenience is key with main level laundry just steps away. The lower level offers even more space with a fourth bedroom, a versatile bonus flex room, and a large recreation area ready to be customized as a home theater, gym, play room, whatever you heart desires! Outdoor living shines with a huge, fully fenced backyard and large deck—ideal for gatherings, play, or simply relaxing in privacy. Nestled in the desirable Robinson School District, this home is just minutes from George Mason University, with easy access to Fairfax County Parkway and the Beltway. This is truly the nicest lot in the community—don’t miss your chance to call it home!

Welcome to your dream home at the Elan at East Market Condo, located at 4480 Market Commons Dr, Fairfax, VA 22033. This stunning residence offers a perfect blend of modern luxury and convenience, nestled in the heart of Fairfax’s vibrant Market Commons community. Step inside to discover gleaming hardwood floors that flow throughout the open-concept living space, accentuated by recessed lighting and a cozy gas fireplace with a stylish mantle - perfect for relaxing evenings at home. The gourmet kitchen is a chef’s delight, featuring a spacious kitchen island, stainless steel appliances including a gas stove, microwave, fridge with ice and water dispenser, and dishwasher, plus ample room for an eat-in dining area. The primary suite is a true retreat, boasting a generous walk-in closet and a luxurious en-suite bathroom with a tub-shower combo. This condo also includes a versatile den, ideal for a home office or guest space, a convenient half bath, and a stackable washer-dryer for effortless laundry days. Enjoy your morning coffee or unwind in the evening on your private balcony, offering a peaceful outdoor escape. Additional highlights include a dedicated parking space with the opportunity to purchase another parking space. The Elan at East Market community elevates your lifestyle with premium amenities such as a state-of-the-art gym, a welcoming club room, a sparkling pool, and a tennis court - perfect for staying active and socializing with neighbors. Living here means you’re just steps away from the best of Fairfax. Indulge in local shopping and dining at the nearby Fairfax Corner and Fair Oaks Mall, offering everything from boutique stores to popular eateries like Uncle Julio’s and Coastal Flats. For everyday convenience, Whole Foods Market and other  retail stores are just a short stroll away. Commuters will appreciate the prime location with easy access to I-66, Route 50, and the Vienna/Fairfax-GMU Metro station, connecting you to the greater D. C. area with ease. Don’t miss this opportunity to own a slice of Fairfax luxury - schedule your tour today!

*  * Professional photos and  video tour will be updated on 1/08/26 *  *  Welcome to 3849 Rainier Dr, an exceptional townhome situated on a coveted lot backing to parkland with tranquil, treed views. This just 3-year-young masterpiece spans over 3,500 sq ft and offers 4 spacious bedrooms and 5 luxurious bathrooms, thoughtfully designed for modern living. Numerous recent upgrades make this home truly special, including custom closet systems in both the his-and-her closets and the kitchen pantry, maximizing space and functionality. Step inside to an inviting open floor plan accented by exquisite wainscoting and shadow box detailing throughout. The heart of the home is the impressive kitchen, featuring an expansive quartz center island, upgraded cabinetry with glass inserts, and a walk-in pantry any chef would adore. Every inch of this home showcases upgraded fixtures that elevate the interiors, from the Viticcio chandelier from Arhaus to the Briolette glass vessel sinks paired with Kohler Composed titanium faucets. The primary suite is a private retreat, complete with his-and-her closets and a luxurious bath featuring a spa-like shower and freestanding tub. Just outside the primary bedroom, a conveniently located laundry room is fully equipped with custom cabinetry, a hanging rod, and a sink. Additional living space awaits in the private loft suite, offering a bedroom, full bath, rec room, and terrace, perfect for guests or relaxation. Entertaining is effortless, whether in the living room with a custom entertainment center and built-in beverage coolers, on the expansive composite deck, or in the walk-out basement complete with a built-in hall tree, full bath, and access to the backyard patio. Enjoy the convenience of extra parking directly in front of the home, with easy walking access to grocery stores, shopping, and dining. Ideally located near major roadways, IAD, and the Vienna Metro, and situated within the highly sought-after Navy, Franklin, and Oakton school districts! Experience the perfect blend of luxury, location, and lifestyle at 3849 Rainier Dr. .. more than a home, it’s an opportunity to live the life you’ve envisioned.

Welcome to 11319 Aristotle Dr, a beautifully updated and rarely available 2-level condo ideally located in the heart of Fairfax. This home features 2 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, 2 balconies, an in-unit washer and dryer, and a 1-car garage with a driveway, along with multiple visitor parking passes. Luxury vinyl plank flooring runs throughout both levels, including the stairs, adding a cohesive and modern touch. The updated kitchen showcases white cabinetry with gold hardware, a white quartz island, and stainless-steel appliances, creating a clean, stylish, and functional space. The spacious open-concept living and dining area features crown molding, neutral tones, and abundant natural light, offering a warm and inviting setting ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The upper level provides a private retreat, highlighted by a primary suite with an en-suite bath and walk-in closet. The second bedroom includes its own walk-in closet and private balcony. Both bathrooms have been thoughtfully updated with sleek vanities and modern lighting, and the upper level also includes a full-size washer and dryer for added convenience. Located in a gated community, residents enjoy access to excellent amenities including an outdoor pool, clubhouse, meeting room, pool table, gym, playground, tot lot, walking trails, and storage units available for rent. Conveniently situated across the street from shopping and dining, with easy access to Route 50, Route 66, Fairfax County Parkway, and the Vienna Metro. Don’t miss this opportunity to own a stylish, rarely available, move-in-ready home in the highly sought-after Fairfax Ridge.

Welcome to 3209 Armory Court, a beautifully maintained home tucked away on a quiet cul-de-sac in the highly sought-after Mosby Woods neighborhood of Fairfax City. Offering 2,671 square feet of living space, this 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath home has been truly loved and thoughtfully cared for over the years. The spacious layout provides comfortable everyday living along with flexible space for entertaining, working from home, or gathering with family and friends. Generous room sizes, abundant natural light, and a sense of warmth throughout reflect the pride of ownership evident in every corner of the home. Located in one of Fairfax City’s most established communities, Mosby Woods is known for its mature trees, sidewalks, and proximity to parks, schools, shopping, dining, and major commuter routes. This home presents a wonderful opportunity to settle into a timeless neighborhood and make it your own. A rare find in a prime location—don’t miss your chance to call this Mosby Woods gem home.

An elegantly designed main level with an open concept living featuring a cozy one bedroom, and one full bath for your convenience, a gourmet kitchen with a large entertaining center island and ample cabinet space designed for those who cherish cooking and entertaining, with stainless steel appliances, a central island perfect for meal prep and gathering, and an open concept design that seamlessly connects to the dining room and living area create a harmonious flow throughout the dream home. The second level is where you will find your Master Bedroom a sanctuary of luxury living highlighted by the splendid master bathroom and ample space for relaxation and two generously sized bedrooms each with its own en-suite bathroom tailed for modern comfort. The convenience of the laundry room on this level adds practically to your daily routine. Remember, good things are worth waiting for! This is a great value for a new home!

Coming Soon! Expected on the market 4/15/2026 – don’t miss your chance to call this remarkable Mantua home yours! If you’ve been searching for a modern, luxurious home in a truly special setting, this is it. Perfectly positioned at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac on a beautifully landscaped 0.54-acre lot, this stunning residence offers approximately 7,200 sq ft of thoughtfully designed living space across three finished levels. Step inside and feel instantly at home. The main level features an inviting open layout, anchored by a chef’s dream kitchen—complete with an oversized Quartz waterfall island, 42” sink, professional 48” JennAir range with 6 burners and infrared griddle, pot filler, 48” JennAir refrigerator, beverage center, JennAir dishwasher, custom cabinet lighting, and a large walk-in pantry. Just off the kitchen, the scullery adds even more convenience with a second dishwasher, beverage cooler, sink, and gorgeous Quartz counters. The kitchen seamlessly flows into the bright family room with an elegant gas fireplace, setting the perfect scene for relaxing or entertaining. For more formal gatherings, enjoy the sophisticated dining room, or take your work-from-home calls in the main level office. Unique to this home, you’ll find a spacious main level en-suite bedroom, ideal for guests, in-laws, or anyone who prefers fewer stairs as well as a stylish half bath for visitors. Step outside to a tranquil screened-in stone porch with its own fireplace, overlooking your private, professionally landscaped backyard oasis. Upstairs, unwind in the luxurious primary suite featuring tray ceilings, two custom walk-in closets, a private balcony, and a spa-inspired bath with a dramatic wet room (dual shower heads and body sprays), soaking tub, skylight, heated floors, dual vanities, and two separate toilet rooms. Three additional bedrooms, each with their own private bath, plus a well-equipped laundry room complete the upper level. The walk-up lower level is an entertainer’s dream: enjoy a signature Quartz bar with beverage cooler and dishwasher, a large rec room, dedicated media room, gym, and a sixth bedroom with full bath, plenty of space for everyone. All this in a fantastic Mantua location, just outside the Beltway with easy access to Rte 50, Rte 66, and I-395. Minutes to Inova Fairfax Hospital, Dunn Loring and Vienna Metro stations, and the Mosaic District’s shopping and dining. Zoned for sought-after Woodson High School.

PRIME LOCATION on a HALF ACRE lot in MANTUA at the heart of Fairfax. This well-loved home exudes timeless charm and invites you to infuse your personal style with modern enhancements—ideal for both the savvy investor and the discerning owner. Offering the best of both worlds, this property provides the freedom to customize while delivering peace of mind through significant updates already completed. Enjoy the confidence of a new roof, an upgraded heating system installed within the last five years, a new hot water heater, select new windows, a new refrigerator, and a brand-new gas dryer. With approximately 2,343 square feet of living space, this charming split level home features four spacious bedrooms, boasts hardwood floors on the main level and abundant natural light. A fully finished walkout basement adds even more versatility, featuring newer flooring, a fourth bedroom, a full bathroom, and a spacious recreation room complete with built-ins, a wet bar, and a cozy fireplace—perfect for entertaining or creating a private guest retreat. An attached carport provides covered parking for two vehicles, with additional open spaces available. The home is also within close proximity to top-rated schools, including Mantua Elementary, Frost Middle, and Woodson High School. Commuters will appreciate the easy access to major highways and public transportation, making travel to Washington, D. C. , and surrounding areas convenient.

​Updated 2BR, 1BA condo with two assigned parking spaces (122/123) and a storage unit (#27) in sought after Main Street Green condominiums. Enjoy the Fairfax City lifestyle with lots of shops, and restaurants. Updates include fresh new paint, new A/C Registers, new bathroom light fixture and mirror. The living/dining room combination offers a great space to entertain. Efficiently designed kitchen with everything a cook could want - built-in microwave, gas stove, dishwasher, and refrigerator. Spacious bedrooms with plenty of space for sleep, storage or play. Stackable washer and dryer located inside unit. Community offers an outdoor pool. Conveniently located on major commuter routes.

Welcome to a beautifully designed and exceptionally maintained home in one of Fairfax’s premier 55+ communities, offering nearly 1,400 sq. ft. of spacious, single-level living just steps from the Vienna–GMU Metro. Built only five years ago, this modern residence combines comfort, convenience, and luxury—ideal for those seeking an easy, connected lifestyle without sacrificing elegance. Located on the quiet back side of the building, the unit is filled with natural light and overlooks the serene courtyard, creating a peaceful retreat while still being moments from everyday essentials. The open floor plan flows effortlessly from the airy living and dining space into a gourmet kitchen featuring granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, a breakfast bar, and plenty of storage—perfect for both casual meals and entertaining. Enjoy your morning coffee or an afternoon read on the private outdoor balcony, large enough for a small table and chairs. The primary suite is generously sized and offers a spa-like bathroom with dual vanity and a spacious walk-in closet. The second bedroom is equally comfortable, with direct access to a second full bath featuring a walk-in shower with seating—a thoughtful design detail for comfort and safety. A separate den/office adds flexibility for work, hobbies, or overnight guests, and the full-size laundry room makes daily living effortless. This community is truly something special—designed for active adults who value wellness, social connection, and resort-style amenities. Residents enjoy access to an indoor heated swimming pool, professional fitness center, yoga studio, modern clubhouse and lounge, bike storage, beautiful courtyard with BBQ grills, and more. With two assigned garage parking spaces on G1, secure building access, and close proximity to I-66, grocery stores, parks, medical services, and public transportation, everything you need is within easy reach. A perfect blend of sophistication, comfort, and community—this is luxury 55+ living at its finest.

Former model home in the sought-after Enclave at Fair Lakes, this elegant 3 bedroom, 3.5 bath townhome with a 2-car garage offers an open concept layout with a gourmet kitchen featuring upgraded finishes, a bright and spacious living area, and an entry-level rec room perfect for work or play. Thoughtfully designed with stylish model-home touches throughout, this property is being offered fully furnished for a truly turnkey experience, with the option to purchase unfurnished if preferred. Ideally located near Fair Lakes shopping, dining, major commuter routes, parks, and everyday conveniences.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome home to stunning 10121 RATCLIFFE MANOR DRIVE in the coveted Farrcroft Community, located in the heart of the City of Fairfax. This beautiful award-winning CLIFFHURST model 6 BEDROOM 5 1/ 2 BATH home offers the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and elegance. With over 6,000+ finished square-feet of living space situated on a premier cul-de-sac lot, welcome in to a two-story foyer with a sophisticated chandelier, gleaming hardwood floors, high ceilings, and dual split staircases. Wall to wall windows flood the space with natural light, and hardwood floors throughout the home add a touch of character. The formal living and dining rooms, with Palladian windows, crown moldings and chair railings add to the elegance. The dining room, featuring a vintage crystal chandelier, is perfect for all of your holiday gatherings. The light-filled sunroom offers a beautiful space to enjoy the garden views on three sides. The gorgeous gourmet kitchen is a chef’s dream with top tier appliances, subzero refrigerator, ample cabinet space, quartz countertops, large island for seating and custom natural stone backsplash. The adjacent morning room includes a view of the rear yard and connects to a private deck; a peaceful oasis surrounded and protected by beautiful, mature greenery. Easy flow from the kitchen, the spacious family room boasts a cozy fireplace and soaring two-story ceilings, creating the perfect setting for relaxing or entertaining guests. The large and private office features a custom built-in desk, hardwood floors, ceiling fan and an en-suite full bathroom with tub/shower. The well- equipped laundry room, with newer washer  &  dryer, is most organized offering custom cabinets and shelving. The upper level boasts four bedrooms and three upgraded full baths with elegant fixtures and custom tile finishes. The luxurious owner’s suite serves as a true personal retreat featuring a cozy sitting area, tray ceiling, dual custom finished walk-in closets, and ceiling fan. The spa-like en-suite bath offers a soaking tub, an oversized shower, and dual vanities, creating a serene oasis. The primary bathroom is a peaceful, spa-like space, showcasing a sleek walk-in shower with custom tiles, frameless glass walk-in shower and relaxing soaking tub. The second bedroom, with a walk-in closet, has its own ensuite bathroom with a tub/shower. Two spacious bedrooms share the Jack and Jill bathroom with dual vanity and tub/shower combination. The lower level is an entertainer’s dream, featuring an expansive recreation room with fireplace and wet bar, bedroom five features a walk -in closet and attached full bathroom, sixth bedroom and an over-sized storage  &  utility room. Step outside to your private brick courtyard—an inviting outdoor space perfect for dining al fresco or unwinding after a busy day. The two-car garage, located at the front of the home, provides secure parking and additional storage. Location is outstanding- this home backs to the community trails and scenic nature views. Farrcroft amenities include private residents-only pool and pool house, tot lots, and scenic walking trails that wind through Daniels Run Stream. Historic Old Town Fairfax hosts yearly festivals and events including a weekly farmers market between May-October. Enjoy charming shops, restaurants, museums, and library--all within walking distance. Your new home at 10121 RATCLIFFE MANOR DRIVE offers a special lifestyle in a welcoming, vibrant community. Look no further –YOU ARE HOME!!

* Photos and floorplan are from a similar model home adjacent to 10708 Warwick Avenue  (currently occupied. ) Stunning LUXURY 6-bedroom NEW construction home slated to be ready for a January 2026 completetion!  This property offers an elegant modern open floorplan on three levels with high-end designer finishes thoughtful custom details for an unparalleled lifestyle and elegant entertaining in the heart of vibrant Fairfax City. A covered portico welcomes you into the spacious front foyer with a double coat closet. The foyer leads to the hallway with a sought-after main level 14x15' bedroom  with a private full bathroom - perfect for an in-law or guest suite, a lovely studio or home library. The hall opens to an impressive front living room with space for a baby grand, extensive custom trimwork, a coffered ceiling, and gorgeous oak hardwoods. The banquet-sized formal dining room features a tray ceiling and offers the ideal space for celebrating holidays and hosting friends and family. The home was designed to offer optimal space and light with extra high ceilings and lovely double height Pella energy efficient windows to brighten each room. Everyone's favorite space to gather will be in the expansive gourmet kitchen and family great room. The chef's dream kitchen features custom designed 42" cabinetry, fabulous Cambria quartz countertops and kitchen island with a breakfast bar, and premium stainless steel appliances, including a Thermador professional grade gas range. The breakfast area leads to the beautiful great room with a cozy fireplace and a French door to the private deck overlooking the large fenced backyard - perfect for grilling out under the stars. Completing the main level is the mud room leading to the two car garage - offering the perfect drop zone for the family entrance into the home. The extra-wide turned oak staircase brings you to the upper level with a luxurious  21x17' owner's wing with the finest of finishes - the ultimate place to relax and unwind. This primary bedroom with a coffered ceiling has a sitting area, a spa-worthy en suite bathroom with a double vanity, a soaking tub, and Italian tiles in the framelass over-sized walk-in shower, plus an enviable 15x16ft walk in closet with custom built-ins. This upper level offers three additional bedrooms, each with an adjoining bathroom access and a walk in closet. This top level has a convenient separate laundry room for a full sized washer and dryer. The lowest level is the ultimate place to invite everyone over to watch the big game with a finished rec room with a large wet bar, a guest half bathroom, and a walkout exit to the backyard. The lowest level has a 14x13' home office, a spacious theater or workout space, a storage/utility room, and a 6th bedroom with it's own private full bathroom and walk-in closet. This rare to find new construction home is in an established neighborhood with no HOA, lovely quiet tree-framed streets in a sought-after location only minutes to Old Town Fairfax City, GMU, the Mosiac District shops and dining, Fairfax Corner, Fair Oaks Mall, beautiful parks and biking trails and amazing commuting options: less than 5 minutes drive to the Vienna/Fairfax/GMU Metro or hop on the CUE bus (fare-free!) to GMU, the City of Fairfax and the Metro! WALK to shops, restaurants, and neighborhood parks. This impressive new construction home offers an uncompromising lifestyle with luxury living on a spacious level half acre lot in a desireable location with top Fairfax schools and amenities. Welcome HOME!

This Charming 1 Bedroom, 1 bath Condo with Den is Located right in the Heart of Fairfax, within walking distance of  George Mason University!  An abundance of natural light floods the home through the sliding glass doors, which exit to a private balcony overlooking the courtyard. The home features a renovated kitchen with new cabinets, granite countertops and stainless steel appliances. The entire condo was just updated in November 2025 with brand new paint and carpet throughout. New lighting was added as well. The home is located on a quiet street with no through traffic, and the neighborhood is adjacent to a Park with Soccer Fields. Water, Electricity, Gas, trash removal, and snow removal are all paid for by the Condo Fees. The unit also comes with an auxiliary storage area located on the lower level of the building. This unit is VERY clean, and will not last long.

Welcome to Penderbrook, the incomparable recreational community offering an array of opportunities to maintain a healthy lifestyle, all within an easy commute to work and entertainment. The ideal floor plan. .. Two separate and virtually equal primary suites in an entirely updated patio-level condo. This spacious 1,250 square foot condominium offers sophisticated living in Penderbrook, well known and sought after as a recreational community in the heart of Fairfax. The kitchen is recently remodeled, boasting white shaker-style cabinets, including a dedicated pantry cabinet, complemented by beautiful granite countertops with a coordinating tile backsplash and sleek stainless-steel appliances, all set on a stylish ceramic tile floor. A separate dining room is ideal for entertaining. Relax in the living room featuring a cozy wood-burning fireplace with marble surround and convenient built-in shelving with cabinet storage. Adjacent to the living room, a glass-sheathed sunroom with large windows provides a bright retreat or a home office and opens via a sliding glass door to a private patio with a handy storage closet. Walk out the sunroom door for a quick walk down to Mulligans Pub on the Green!  The condo includes two generous bedrooms: the primary bedroom features two closets and an updated ensuite bath with a wide vanity, attractive quartz sinktop, and contemporary fixtures. The second bedroom is equally appealing with a walk-in closet and direct access to the second full bath. This floor plan is ideal for so many lifestyles:  two roommates sharing a kitchen and living space, or a parent and child. A dedicated laundry room with a full-size washer and dryer adds convenience. Penderbrook amenities are unrivalled, including a golf course, fitness center, pool complex, tennis and basketball courts, and tot lots. Its prime location near Fair Oaks Shopping Center, Fairfax Corner, and Fair Oaks Hospital, with easy access to Route 66 and a Metro-serving bus line, makes commuting and errands effortless. Reston Town Center is also just a short drive away. This isn't just a home, it's a lifestyle.

Welcome to this beautifully updated, light-filled condo located in the heart of Fairfax City—just steps to shopping, dining, parks, and all the charm that Old Town Fairfax has to offer. Large master bedroom has custom walk-in closet, and full bath with linen closet and dual-sink vanity. Second master bedroom also offers custom walk-in closet, and remodeled second master bath with custom tiling and upgraded vanity. In-unit washer  &  dryer. Condo fee includes water  &  sewer, security, fitness center, basketball court, pool, barbecue, party rooms, business center, and electric-car charging station. Storage unit and assigned garage parking spot convey; visitor parking spaces also available. New 2019 water heater. Unbeatable location: across street from Orange Line Dunn Loring Metro and Harris Teeter, shops, restaurants, and short walk to Target and Mosaic District. Commuter's dream with access to I-66, 495, 50 and 29.

Potential to Span  four levels, this residence features over-sized windows, flooding the interiors with natural light and showcasing the beauty of its surroundings. This home offers an array of customization options to fit your lifestyle: Lower Level: Choose from a finished recreation room with a powder room, an additional bedroom with a full bath or optional shower, a walk-up basement areaway, or add luxury touches like a fireplace, wet bar, game room, exercise room, and a spa retreat with a steam shower and sauna. The home is ideally located, surrounded by excellent schools, parks, restaurants, and amenities. *  * Delightful Split-Level Home with Expansive Yard in Fairfax *  *  This wonderfully maintained split-level gem boasts 4 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, a cozy fireplace and is centrally located to GMU, shopping centers, and more in Fairfax. As you step inside, you’ll be welcomed by beautiful hardwood floors on the main level and a large bay-window providing natural light throughout the home. The true heart of this home is the bright, airy kitchen, accented by a large window overlooking the large fully fenced back yard!The dining room offers convenient access to the large deck for outdoor dining. The hardwood floors continue upstairs to a full bathroom , and three spacious bedrooms. Venture outside to discover the spacious yard, an ideal setting for outdoor activities and entertaining. The generous deck serves as a wonderful space for unwinding. Plus a detached shed offers plenty of storage. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a well-cared-for home in the heart of Fairfax.

Step into a bright, open-concept living space featuring modern finishes, newer LVP flooring, and large windows that flood the unit with natural light. The kitchen boasts granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and ample cabinet space—perfect for any home chef. The spacious bedroom offers a peaceful view of open green space, and the fully renovated bathroom features sleek tilework and contemporary fixtures. Enjoy your morning coffee or evening wine on the private balcony, with a stunning 3rd-floor view. This unit comes with in-unit laundry, assigned parking, and access to community amenities including a pool, clubhouse, and walking trails. Located just minutes from I-66, Fairfax Corner, Fair Oaks Mall, and George Mason University, and walking distance to grocery stores, dining, and entertainment. This is the perfect place to call home—whether you’re a first-time buyer, downsizing, or seeking a fantastic investment opportunity.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Enjoy maintenance-free living with this beautiful condo! Welcome to Charleston Square Townhomes! This beautiful interior-unit residence combines timeless Colonial charm with modern comfort. The brick-front exterior sets a classic tone, while inside you’ll find a spacious open layout designed for today’s lifestyle. Enjoy a freshly painted interior, stunning new hardwood floors in the family room off the kitchen, and plush new carpeting throughout. The gourmet kitchen features sleek countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a bright breakfast area that flows effortlessly into the family room — perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. Abundant natural light shines through double-pane windows, highlighting the home’s inviting atmosphere. Offering three bedrooms and three-and-a-half baths, including a fully finished daylight basement, this home provides plenty of room to relax and gather. Two fireplaces with glass doors add warmth and elegance, while the balcony and patio offer peaceful spots to enjoy city views. Additional features include a two-car garage and concrete driveway for convenience. Charleston Square residents also enjoy beautifully maintained common areas and a welcoming community feel. This home is more than just a place to live — it’s a retreat where style and comfort come together.

Welcome to Greta Manor, an extraordinary estate, a true masterpiece of luxury living offering refined single-level elegance on a  wooded 1.28-acre lot. Every aspect of this home has been curated with meticulous attention to detail, blending timeless architecture with the 2026 "drama" color palette and the most advanced modern comforts to create a lifestyle of unparalleled sophistication. Designed with highly desirable one-level living, plus loft and lower level, the residence offers 7,287sf including six opulent bedrooms, each with its own ensuite bath, plus two additional half baths. The palatial primary suite is a sanctuary of indulgence with 12-foot ceilings, an enormous spa-like retreat featuring double mirror smart shower technology, soaking tub, designer tile work, and elegant finishes throughout. One suite is built to ADA standards for comfort and accessibility for all guests. The main living areas are impressive with 18-foot ceilings in the living room, dining room, foyer, study, and kitchen. Exceptional architectural details exude rich craftsmanship with  the custom beams, boxed, vaulted, and barrel ceiling designs adding bespoke character and dimension to each space. The heart of the home is the gourmet chef’s kitchen, a showcase of both beauty and functionality. Appointed with 48-inch cabinetry, a professional 48-inch range, a 42-inch built-in refrigerator, dual dishwashers, a wall oven, two smart workstation sinks, dual beverage centers, and an impressive 13-foot natural quartzite waterfall island, this kitchen is as opulent as it is practical—perfect for both intimate gatherings and large-scale entertaining. Hardwood flooring flows seamlessly throughout the residence, complemented by four elegant fireplaces, designer accent walls, and the latest in smart-home technology, including state-of-the-art toilets, bidets, sinks, and faucets. Comfort is enhanced by an elaborate multi-zone HVAC system and an upgraded window package, while the home’s exterior construction features solid 2x6 framing, Hardiplank board and batten siding, and timeless stone detailing for enduring beauty and strength. The finished walk-out lower level is a true entertainer’s paradise with soaring 10-foot ceilings, an expansive custom bar, and multiple recreation and gathering areas, designed for both grand celebrations and relaxed leisure. A teen suite occupies the upper level, providing a private retreat for guests or family. Outdoor living is equally magnificent, with a covered porch and a fully equipped outdoor kitchen complete with pizza oven, grill, beverage center, sink, and fireplace. Whether hosting summer soirées or enjoying quiet evenings by the fire, this outdoor space is designed for luxurious al fresco living at its finest. The oversized 3 car garage includes an expanded 4th bay for outdoor gear and toys, and a triple wide driveway that easily accommodates a dozen additional cars. Every element of this remarkable estate reflects elegance, opulence, and craftsmanship of the highest caliber. From its soaring ceilings and spa-inspired bathrooms to its bespoke finishes and seamless integration of modern smart technology, this home represents the pinnacle of refined, resort-style living in an exceptional setting.

Don’t miss this rare opportunity to own a bright and spacious 2-bed, 2-bath condo (1,120+ sq ft) in the sought-after active adult community of Saintsbury Plaza. Includes assigned parking (Stall #1-5). Comfort, convenience, and community—this condo has it all. Especially, short walking distance to Vienna Metro Station ( Orange Line) where has commercial buses to New York City) and also very short walking distance to Jim Scott Community Center. In addition, I-66 , route 29, route 50 and Nutley Shopping Plaza ( where has Safeway, Micro Center, Bank of America etc. ) , Target, Home Depot and Great Wall Super Market are all near-by with very short driving distance. Also, the Reagan International Airport (DCA) could be reached by Orange Metro Line without transfers, and the Dulles Informational Airport (IAD) is accessible by Silver Metro Line (Transfer at the West Falls Church from Orange Line) . This unit offers great advantages to frequent travelers without needing to drive! Welcome to 10719 Viognier Terrace, a beautifully upgraded 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath condo in Fairfax’s sought after Mount Vineyard community. This two-level home lives like a townhome, offering 2,647 sq ft of space, wide-plank hardwood floors, oversized windows, and a bright, open layout. The updated white-on-white kitchen features quartz countertops, brand-new stainless steel appliances, a large island, and ample space for dining and entertaining. A two-sided gas fireplace adds warmth to both the living and dining areas, and a powder room completes the main level. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite includes a large walk-in closet with a custom system and a modern bath with dual vanities and a glass-enclosed shower. Two additional bedrooms, a stylish hall bath, and a full-size laundry room offer flexibility and comfort. Built in 2017, the home includes fresh paint and updated lighting throughout, plus a 1-car garage and driveway. HOA covers exterior maintenance, water, and trash. Located just minutes from Old Town Fairfax, local parks, dining, and major commuter routes including I-66, Route 123, Route 50, Route 29, I-495, and the Vienna Metro—this home combines low-maintenance living with unmatched convenience.

marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: BRAND NEW CONSTRUCTION JUST FINISHED- MOTIVATED SELLER-  Discover this exquisite modern custom build contemporary new construction home, boasting over 6100 square feet of luxury on a flat . 50-acre corner lot in heart of Fairfax City. This residence features a side-load 2-car garage and an array of elegant amenities, including a main-level en-suite bedroom/office, four bedrooms upstairs, and another on the lower level. This home has an oversized 510 sq feet garage, 215 sq feet front stone porch, 182 sq ft second level deck and features 6 bedrooms/6.5 baths, providing ample space for a comfortable and luxurious lifestyle. This luxury estate home offers an unparalleled blend of elegance and customization. Enter through the designer double front doors from the welcoming covered stone front porch and be greeted by a stunning 2-story foyer. The main floor impresses with formal living and dining rooms, a chef's gourmet kitchen equipped with high-end Thermador stainless steel appliances, a 11-foot center island with waterfall edge luxury quartz countertops and designer series maple cabinetry. The main level also includes an oversized Guest Suite with a private bath perfect for a weekend guest but designed to support full time living. Second floor owner’s Suite – Private retreat with a Boxed Ceiling, two Walk-In Closets, and a luxurious bath with quartz countertops, freestanding tub and shower. Master bathroom also has a separate morning room and loft area for owner’s convenience. Every bedroom has private En-Suit baths, with walk-in closets. Two bedrooms also have attached morning/sitting/Loft areas, perfect for a home office, playroom, or retreat. Lower Level is fully finished with a Recreation Room, Bar, Exercise Room and additional Bedroom with Full Bath. This remarkable home is equipped with dual-zone Carrier HVAC systems, a 75-gallon electric water heater, PVC exterior trim, 30-year shingles, and combination of stones and Hardie board siding, ensuring style and durability. The home's design is elegant and modern, featuring a modern transitional exterior from stone to Hardy Planks. The construction of this property is of the highest standards, including 9 ft ceilings on all levels, exquisite modern moldings with custom LED lighting, wide plank oak hardwood floors, custom porcelain tile in every bathroom, and Kohler toilets. The house also features modern handrails, black windows, LED ambient lighting, tray ceilings in the family room, custom cabinetry in every bathroom, and an EV outlet in the garage. The location offers easy access to amenities, major highways, and metro stations, providing a connected lifestyle without compromising luxury. Interested buyers are encouraged to contact the listing agent to schedule a meeting with the builder.

A custom built Craftman Style home with elegant touches throughout. The Alexandra Model features a new modern open floor plan of 5,790 sq. ft . which includes  3 finished levels plus 6 bedrooms and 6.5 baths. Open and airy with 10' ceilings on the first floor with ceiling beams in the family room and 9' ceilings on the upper and lower levels. The Master Suite features a tray ceiling plus his and her over sized walk-in custom closets. An inviting master bathroom welcomes you with heated floors, porcelain tile shower and  quartz counters plus an delightful soaking tub. All 4 bedrooms  on the upper level come with their own full bath and custom closet. Spacious laundry room on upper level, includes washer and dryer and laundry sink. Stunning gourmet kitchen features a 10'  island and quartz counter tops and backsplash. Huge walk in pantry with room for everything kitchen. Upgraded high end  appliances. Naturally light filled rooms from a wall of windows at the back of the house allows you to walkout from the family room and extend your living space to this spacious deck. Perfect floor plan for work from home buyers. The first floor has a den plus another office/bedroom and also features a  full bath plus  an additional  powder room on the main level. Beautiful 7" wide plank wood floors on main and upper levels with Luxury Vinyl on the lower level. Solid oak tread and white riser on stairs. Finished lower level with recreation room, workout room and office/bedroom plus a full bath on a walkout lower level to a private  lot. Side load finished garage with coated floor and electric car charger. Quality built with Hardi Plank siding and stone veneer, architectural shingles, water filtration system, radon system in foundation plus a 16x16 deck overlooking treed backyard. Situated on a  2 acre lot on a quiet street, so hard to find in this area!  There is a county park across the street geared towards the nature lover. The lot goes beyond the silt black fence on the left and the lot extends about a 1/2 acre behind the creek. Seller will consider holding Mortgage with 20% down!! Convenient location to major roads, airport, shopping and excellent Fairfax County schools, including Woodson HS Landscaping for the backyard is still in progress.

READY FOR QUICK SETTLEMENT! NEW CONSTRUCTION IN FAIRFAX CITY Plus a NEW PRICE providing an exceptional value! Welcome home to this custom-built modern home offers a flexible 3-bedroom, 3-bath layout ideal for downsizing or rightsizing, featuring two bedrooms on the upper level and a third legal bedroom or office on the walk-out lower level. All three levels include walk-in closets designed to accommodate a future elevator. With 2,337 sq. ft. across three finished levels, the home showcases 10-ft ceilings, wide-plank flooring, and an open-concept main level with a sleek linear gas fireplace. The gourmet kitchen includes 54” custom cabinetry, quartz countertops, a 36” gas range, upgraded stainless steel appliances, and a large walk-in pantry with wood shelving. The upper-level primary suite offers a spa-inspired bath with soaking tub, oversized shower, and dual quartz vanities. A second bedroom, full bath, and laundry room complete this level. The walk-out lower level provides a private third bedroom/office with a full bath. Additional features include a two-car front-load garage, a full covered front porch, designer finishes throughout, and HOA-provided lawn care for low-maintenance living. Prime location in the heart of the City of Fairfax—close to GMU, the Center for the Arts, Vienna Metro, Tysons Corner, Eden Center, and just moments from Historic Old Town Fairfax shops, cafés, and community events.

marketingRemarks.label: Description
marketingRemarks.marketingRemark: Welcome to this stunning 5-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom home, perfectly situated on a quarter-acre corner lot. With 5,540 sq. ft. of finished living space, this home is designed for comfort, entertainment, and modern living. Its open-concept design, spacious rooms, and abundant natural light make it an inviting and functional space for any lifestyle. The home features four AC units, water heater updated in 2024, and a garage with an impressive 14-foot ceiling height, blending luxury and practicality. Main Level – Perfect for Living  &  Entertaining The open-concept kitchen flows seamlessly into an extra-large family room with an electric fireplace, making it the heart of the home. The kitchen is equipped with stainless steel appliances, plenty of counter space, and a sunroom behind it for added living space. A formal dining room, separate living room, large office, breakfast area, full bathroom, and laundry room complete the main floor. Second Floor – Luxurious Master Suite  &  Additional Bedrooms The master suite is a true retreat, featuring a fireplace, with an en-suite bathroom including a jacuzzi tub, walk-in shower, double vanity, separate toilet room, and two spacious walk-in closets. It also includes a private nook, currently used as a second office, adding extra versatility to the space. Three additional generously sized bedrooms and a full bathroom provide plenty of space for family or guests on the second floor. Expansive Walkout Basement The fully finished walkout basement offers an abundance of natural light and an extra-large open space, making it ideal for recreation, a home gym, or additional living areas. It includes an additional bedroom, half bathroom, and plenty of ceiling lighting for a bright and inviting feel. Outdoor Living – Perfect for Entertaining The completely fenced-in backyard provides privacy and security. A spacious deck connects directly to the family room with stairs leading to the backyard, making it an ideal space for outdoor gatherings. A ground irrigation system with sprinklers keeps the lawn lush and green year-round. With its prime corner lot location, beautifully designed interior, and entertainer-friendly backyard, this home is a must-see! This home offers expansive living areas throughout, with spacious rooms and an open, airy feel. For showings please contact Davinder Singh: 571-238-4905
